description: Create a formal two-level Data Flow Diagram (DFD) for the Koha Integrated Library System based on the system specification provided in ~/Desktop/koha_system_spec.txt. The diagram must include a Level 0 Context Diagram with the central process 'Koha ILS' and external entities (Patron, Librarian, Publisher/Vendor, OCLC/WorldCat, SIP2 Kiosk), as well as a Level 1 DFD decomposing the system into seven processes (Circulation, Cataloging, Acquisitions, OPAC, Patron Management, Serials, Reports) and five data stores (Biblio Catalog, Patron Database, Transaction Log, Acquisitions Ledger, Serials Registry). Use standard DFD notation to represent all processes, data stores, and labeled data flows. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/koha_library_dfd.drawio and export it as ~/Desktop/koha_library_dfd.png.
